prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, ask Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton for review, and hold the outside send.
summary: Instead of sending the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement to Cargill, Debra retains the draft inside Enron and requests internal review by Gerald Nemec and Sara Shackleton, instructing that no external transmission be made until internal comments are consolidated.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — draft for internal review (hold external send)
messages.body_text: Gerald — Attached is a draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement intended for Cargill. I'm keeping the draft inside Enron for now. Please review the commercial terms, assignment/termination language, and any operational or tax concerns and provide comments or redlines. Do not send this externally; I will consolidate internal comments. Please reply by end of week. Thanks, Debra
messages.rationale: Diverted from sending to the external counterparty; solicit Gerald's commercial/operational review and hold any outside transmission.

messages.subject: Master Agreement — draft for internal legal/credit review (hold send)
messages.body_text: Sara — Attached is the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement (Cargill). Please review the credit provisions, indemnities, bankruptcy and liability language, and advise on any revisions needed. I'm holding the outside send to Cargill until we've consolidated internal legal comments. Target return: end of week. Thanks, Debra
messages.rationale: Request Sara's legal and credit-focused review while withholding the draft from the external recipient until internal clearance is obtained.

top_subjects: Master Agreement — draft for internal legal/credit review (hold send)
Master Agreement — draft for internal review (hold external send)
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
